name: Musement (TUI Group) Experiences Distribution API
what_it_does: Musement (a TUI Group company) tours, museums, and experiences distribution REST API for travel OTAs, hotel chains, and cultural institutions to access and resell skip-the-line museum tickets, guided tours, cultural experiences, food tours, and day trips primarily across Europe and major world cities through Musement's TUI-backed inventory. Enables AI agents to manage museum and attraction ticket search for cultural tourism automation, handle skip-the-line booking for high-demand attraction automation, access guided tour reservation for cultural experience automation, retrieve city and venue catalog for destination content automation, manage availability check for timed-entry ticket automation, handle booking confirmation for experience reservation automation, access multi-language tour content for localized experience automation, retrieve cancellation management for booking reversal automation, manage affiliate link generation for cultural travel monetization automation, and integrate Musement with hotel concierge, travel OTAs, and cultural institutions for end-to-end museum and experience booking automation.
use_cases: Booking skip-the-line Colosseum and Louvre tickets from cultural travel concierge agents
Embedding museum and cultural experience tickets in hotel in-stay digital concierge agents
Distributing guided tour inventory for European travel OTA platform automation agents
Generating affiliate links for cultural travel blog experience monetization agents
not_for: Asia-Pacific activity depth (use Klook for Asia-focused experience inventory)
Adventure sports or extreme activities (Musement focuses on cultural and city experiences)
Flight or hotel booking (Musement is experiences and activities only)
best_when: A European travel OTA, hotel chain, or cultural institution wanting AI agents to access and distribute skip-the-line museum tickets and guided cultural tours from Musement's TUI-backed European experience inventory.
avoid_when: TIMED-ENTRY TICKETS HAVE STRICT WINDOWS: Musement skip-the-line tickets for Vatican, Colosseum, Uffizi are timed-entry; automated booking must specify exact entry time slot; automated flexible-entry assumption creates wrong slot booked and entry denial at attraction. TUI PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED FOR BOOKING API: Musement booking API requires TUI/Musement commercial partner agreement; automated self-service API access creates affiliate-only access not booking; automated full booking requires formal partnership. TICKET VALIDITY IS DATE AND TIME SPECIFIC: Musement timed-entry tickets are strictly non-transferable to different dates; automated date change creates invalid ticket; automated rebooking for missed entry requires full new booking. INVENTORY VARIES BY SEASON: Musement high-demand experiences (Vatican museums) may have weeks-long wait; automated same-day booking assumption for popular European sites creates no_availability; automated booking must check far-in-advance availability for major attractions.

auth.notes: Musement uses API key for partner authentication. REST API with JSON. Milan, Italy HQ. Founded 2013, acquired by TUI Group 2018. TUI Group subsidiary (LSE: TUI). Products: Museum tickets, guided tours, cultural experiences, food tours, day trips. SDKs: None public. GDPR. 35,000+ experiences in 1,000+ cities. European cultural tourism focus. Competes with GetYourGuide and Viator for European cultural experience distribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Affiliate program available; booking API via TUI/Musement partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Commission model: 8-10% per booking; partner margin negotiated
pricing.notes: Milan IT. TUI Group subsidiary (LSE:TUI). Commission-based. European cultural tourism focus. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; webhooks for booking status events

known_agent_gotchas: TIMED-ENTRY SLOT MUST BE SPECIFIED: Musement skip-the-line tickets for major museums require exact time slot selection; automated booking without time slot creates generic booking not accepted at timed-entry attractions

FAR-ADVANCE BOOKING FOR POPULAR ATTRACTIONS: Vatican Museums, Colosseum, Uffizi availability fills weeks ahead; automated same-day or next-day booking assumption creates no_availability; automated must check availability weeks in advance for top European attractions

TICKET IS NON-CHANGEABLE AFTER BOOKING: Musement timed museum tickets cannot be rescheduled; automated date change after booking requires full cancel and rebook; automated simple date-change request creates error for date-locked tickets
PARTNER APPROVAL REQUIRED FOR BOOKING: Musement booking API requires TUI/Musement commercial agreement; automated self-service booking with affiliate key creates redirect-only access

MULTI-LANGUAGE CONTENT BY LOCALE: Musement tour content available in multiple languages; automated single-language content assumption creates English-only display for non-English markets; automated must pass accept-language header for localized content
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cultural experiences OTA. TUI Group/GDPR. API key. EU. Booking and traveler data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cultural OTA. TUI Group subsidiary. GDPR, PSD2. API key. EU. Booking and traveler data.
